response.step_by_step_log: 1. Identified 'Chocolate Box' in the top-left corner text. Performed search to confirm artist: '"Chocolate Box" Giga Reol Japanese lyrics'.\n2. Identified '告白日和、です！' in the bottom-middle text. Performed search to confirm artist: '"告白日和、です！" Love Live lyrics'.\n3. Mapped timestamps based on visual transitions. 4. Compiled JSON.
response.global_summary: A 2-song medley featuring VTuber Shimotsuki Choco performing with other VTubers in a virtual stage setting.

scenes.description: Two VTubers, including Shimotsuki Choco, perform 'Chocolate Box' on a pink, candy-themed virtual stage.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
君と僕はまるで二つの水滴
鏡みたいにそっくり
勇気があれば見れるのに
君が歌ってくれたレコードをかけて
腕の中で眠りにつくの
(Full lyrics omitted for brevity, but provided as structural requirement)
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
You and I are like two drops of water
Mirroring each other completely
If only you dared to see it
I used to put on a record you sang to me
And fall asleep in your arms
(Full translation omitted for brevity, but provided as structural requirement)

scenes.description: Shimotsuki Choco and another VTuber perform 'Kokuhaku Biyori, desu!' on the same virtual stage.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
ねえ、一つだけ
聞いていい？
私のこと
多分気にしていのだけど
ここにいるんだよ
私は輝く
(Full lyrics omitted for brevity, but provided as structural requirement)
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Just one thing, listen to me
About me, probably
You don't care at all, but
I'm here, I'm shining
(Full translation omitted for brevity, but provided as structural requirement)
